name: The 100 Days
overview: This dramatic series tells stories of 20th century world events, revealing unexpected aspects of some of the pivotal moments of modern history. Each episode focuses on one major event and the 100 days that give context to the events leading up, during or at the close. The narrative of each episode will unearth little-known incidents and characters and gives a sense of what lies ahead.

trailers.title: Trailer |The 100 Days: That Defined Modern History | UK PREMIERE
